author: Know-It-Owl
label: Anniversary (with internal run-of-show link)
text:
🦉 *Did you know* CODE LEAP just turned *5 years strong*?

This April we marked our *5th anniversary* (Saturday, *April 11, 2026*) the CODE LEAP way: a full *paintball tournament*. The whole team split into *4 captain-led squads* and battled through rounds, *semifinals, and finals*, with *certificates and snack-bag prizes* for the winners (20 bags for 1st place, 10 for 2nd).

Then we cooled off over a *team dinner* with a speech, a celebratory *toast*, and an optional *karaoke* round nearby for anyone with energy left.

It is an annual tradition: we celebrated our *4th anniversary* last April too, and every Code Coffee shouts out teammates hitting their own work-iversaries. Hit *1 year* here and you will get your moment.

📖 <https://app.notion.com/p/33b298c169e680e19460fbf02cf3f47c|See the full anniversary run-of-show>

_Whooo knew? Here's to year six._ 🦉

author: Know-It-Owl
note: corrected after feedback (vacay was mislabeled; /resource,/help,/slack-feedback revised)
label: Slack slash commands (v1)
text:
🦉 *Did you know* you can run half of your work admin straight from *Slack*?

CODE LEAP has its own custom slash commands. A few worth memorising:
• `/vacay` to request time off
• `/resources` to find company docs and links
• `/request-access` to ask for access to a tool
• `/help` and `/slack-feedback` when you are stuck or have an idea

*How to use it:* type the command into any Slack message box and follow the prompt. No forms, no email chains.

_Whooo knew?_ 🦉

author: Know-It-Owl
label: $500 referral bonus
text:
🦉 *Did you know* you can earn *$500* just for knowing good people?

CODE LEAP runs a *referral bonus*. Refer someone for one of our *starred open roles*, and once your referral *passes probation*, the *$500* is yours. Your network is genuinely worth money here.

*How to use it:* check the *open roles* (the starred ones qualify), refer a friend, and pass their details to our People team. The bonus lands after they clear probation.

_Whooo knew?_ 🦉

author: Know-It-Owl
note: old provider-specific version; flagged for manual deletion, replaced by trimmed version
label: Annual health check-up (Jio version)
text:
🦉 *Did you know* CODE LEAP gives you a *free annual health check-up*?

Every year the team gets a *full medical check-up*. Results come back as a *digital health report in the Jio app* (plus a hard copy), and you get *free remote doctor consultations for a whole year* afterwards.

*How to use it:* watch for the *check-up dates* and your calendar invite, download the *Jio app* to grab your report, and book a remote consult any time a health question pops up.

_Whooo knew?_ 🦉

author: Know-It-Owl
label: The 'Duck' screen-lock tradition
text:
🦉 *Did you know* leaving your laptop unlocked can get you *"ducked"* 🦆?

At CODE LEAP, step away without locking your screen and a teammate can *"duck"* you in the team channel. The playful twist: it comes with a tiny fine that flows into a *team-treats fund*, so the snacks and drinks are on the forgetful.

*How to use it:* lock your screen *every* time you leave your desk. It keeps *client and company info* safe, and keeps you off the duck list.

_Whooo knew?_

author: Know-It-Owl
label: Slack slash commands (v2)
text:
🦉 *Did you know* CODE LEAP has its own *Slack slash commands*?

Two you will actually reach for:
• `/vacay` shows the *company-wide vacation list*, so you can see who is *off and when*
• `/request-access` is the fast way to *request access* to a tool or system

*How to use it:* type the command into any Slack message box and follow the prompt. No forms, no email chains.

_Whooo knew?_ 🦉

author: Know-It-Owl
label: Annual health check-up (trimmed, with how-to)
text:
🦉 *Did you know* CODE LEAP gives you a *free annual health check-up*?

Once a year the whole team gets a *full medical check-up* on the company. You walk away with your *own health report* to keep, an easy way to stay on top of your wellbeing without paying out of pocket.

*How to use it:* watch for the *annual check-up dates* and your *calendar invite*, then just show up. We pick a *medical partner fresh each year*, so check the latest announcement for where to go and what is included.

_Whooo knew?_ 🦉
